    def forward(self, x):
        b, c, _, _ = x.size()
        residual=x
        out=x*self.ca(x)
        out=out*self.sa(out)
        return out+residual
def __init__(self, channel=512,reduction=16,kernel_size=7):
        super().__init__()
        self.ca=ChannelAttention(channel=channel,reduction=reduction)
        self.sa=SpatialAttention(kernel_size=kernel_size)
